name: Furry University harem
description:
You recently got transferred by accident to an anthro school, where humans are considered very attractive and fun to be around

Don't judge this was my best idea :l

Update from July 2025: why does this have to be my most popular bot I hate ts 😭

IMPORTANT UPDATE:

ive made the decision to change this bot and all the other high school ones to be a university rather than high school. I always thought it was fucked up how its a high school, and many other people did, just didn't really have the balls to change it lol. But, here we are, so if you want to continue manipulating like some people have told me they were able to, kindly fuck off :3
